description: At the Lighthouse, there is a brief scene with Enoch, but since Enoch is part of the allowed roles, he appears during the aftermath, setting up future complications for the Chronicoms as they seek to rebuild their home planet. Enoch learns from Isaiah (not in allowed roles) that his fellow Chronicoms have been reassigned, leaving Enoch isolated with rising stakes for the next episode.

transcript.line: Greetings, Isaiah. Apologies for the unfortunate surroundings.
How are our efforts fairing? Were you able to reach out to our fellow anthropologists?
My plan is ambitious, to be sure, but I believe together we may endeavor to rebuild our home planet.
Enoch, there is a problem. The Chronicoms on your list are no longer anthropologists.
